Text: At its meeting on 11 October 2019, the Committee on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights, having considered the withdrawal of the State party, which reports that the authors have been assigned a social housing unit and are now living in it permanently, and with the subsequent agreement of the authors, decided to discontinue the consideration of communication No. 53/2018, in accordance with rule 17 of its provisional rules of procedure under the Optional Protocol to the International Covenant on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights.
